meaning: adj.冒险的,冒危险的,危险的
examples: For women love is a race track venturesome and deathful.
Venturesome travelers in China have a host of Venus from which to choose.
If this disaster teaches anything, it is that we are a venturesome, entrepreneurial society.
But these venturesome fund managers have provided some good returns over the past 12 months.
The haters came on early and strong for this venturesome tri-level seafood shack in Red Hook.
